creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Kastner from comment #27)

The build is the same for both flavors.
Here is the output of FreeBSD 13-amd64 official package.

% tar -vtf rubygem-passenger-nginx-6.0.20.pkg | grep passenger_native_support.so
-rw-r--r--  0 root   wheel   18320 Apr  8 05:24 /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/3.2/gems/passenger-6.0.20/buildout/ruby/ruby-3.2.3-x86_64-freebsd/passenger_native_support.so
